title: Models cheer up rainy day
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Clouds and cold weather...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Clouds and cold weather did not prevent the girls of Ace Models MossGeorge surprising the public at Hartenbos Seefront with a dance and modelling flash mob.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Clouds and cold weather did not prevent the girls of Ace Models MossGeorge surprising the public at Hartenbos Seefront with a dance and modelling flash mob."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wikipedia notes that a flash mob is a group of people that assembles suddenly in a public place, performs for a brief time, then quickly disperses, often for the purposes of entertainment, satire or artistic expression.","html":"Wikipedia notes that a flash mob is a group of people that assembles suddenly in a public place, performs for a brief time, then quickly disperses, often for the purposes of entertainment, satire or artistic expression."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Open day","html":"Open day"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ace Models MossGeorge had an open day last weekend, on Saturday, 16 March, and a meet and greet at the Seefront, with the girls wearing their crowns and sashes, taking photographs and posing as mannequins in store windows.","html":"Ace Models MossGeorge had an open day last weekend, on Saturday, 16 March, and a meet and greet at the Seefront, with the girls wearing their crowns and sashes, taking photographs and posing as mannequins in store windows."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spectators could meet the Ace Models MossGeorge director Elani Pretorius, MoDancè coach Nikita van Zyl and assistant and male coach Alexis Smith.","html":"Spectators could meet the Ace Models MossGeorge director Elani Pretorius, MoDancè coach Nikita van Zyl and assistant and male coach Alexis Smith."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Designs","html":"Designs"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ouma Net designs owner Marinette van der Merwe also showcased her designs, from pageant dresses and party wear to dance costumes.","html":"Ouma Net designs owner Marinette van der Merwe also showcased her designs, from pageant dresses and party wear to dance costumes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elani feels that every class, event and situation is a learning opportunity for the young ladies. She believes it is important to see the lesson in every day and teach children to always see the positive and work as a team.","html":"Elani feels that every class, event and situation is a learning opportunity for the young ladies. She believes it is important to see the lesson in every day and teach children to always see the positive and work as a team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When it started raining and clouds came over the sea, this was no exception. The girls came together and started dancing and walking in the rain.","html":"When it started raining and clouds came over the sea, this was no exception. The girls came together and started dancing and walking in the rain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Equip'","html":"'Equip'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We want to equip these young ladies by not only teaching them about modelling, pageantry and etiquette, but also building character, confidence, so they can be well-rounded young ladies, following their dreams and taking on every challenge with confidence and success,” she said.","html":"“We want to equip these young ladies by not only teaching them about modelling, pageantry and etiquette, but also building character, confidence, so they can be well-rounded young ladies, following their dreams and taking on every challenge with confidence and success,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MoDancè is focused on improving the girls' posture and ballet techniques and teaching them about rhythm and improvisation.","html":"MoDancè is focused on improving the girls' posture and ballet techniques and teaching them about rhythm and improvisation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are grateful for all the support we are receiving and every parent that is part of the programme,\" Elani said.","html":"\"We are grateful for all the support we are receiving and every parent that is part of the programme,\" Elani said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]
